executive_summary: The owner of this 8-person digital marketing agency is trapped doing $25/hour manual work, losing 10+ hours weekly to client reporting, email triage, and follow-up chasing. Implementing off-the-shelf automation for reporting, email, and meeting notes can immediately reclaim strategic time, while deeper investments in a client portal and brand knowledge system will unlock senior designer capacity and improve client experience.

pain_points.title: Manual Client Reporting
pain_points.description: Every Monday the owner spends 3-4 hours soul-crushingly pulling data from Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool into spreadsheets for clients, causing them to always be behind.

pain_points.title: Lost Meeting Action Items
pain_points.description: Daily standups and client check-ins lack proper notes, so action items get lost, staff forget commitments, and the owner ends up chasing people on Slack.

pain_points.title: Email Overload
pain_points.description: The owner is CC'd on everything and receives roughly 200 emails a day, most of which are noise or sales outreach, requiring about 2 hours daily just to sort.

pain_points.title: Senior Designer Bottleneck
pain_points.description: The senior designer loses 6 hours a week creating social media graphics and presentation decks that junior staff should handle, but juniors lack templates or brand guidelines so everything routes back to her.

quick_wins.title: Auto-Pull Reporting Dashboards
quick_wins.description: Connect Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool via Zapier, Make, or n8n to automatically populate a live dashboard or spreadsheet, eliminating the Monday manual compilation ritual.

quick_wins.title: AI Email Triage
quick_wins.description: Deploy SaneBox or Superhuman to automatically filter sales outreach and noise, surfacing only important client and team emails so the owner stops spending 2 hours a day sorting.

quick_wins.title: Automated Meeting Notes & Action Items
quick_wins.description: Implement Fireflies.ai or ClickUp AI to transcribe standups and client check-ins, auto-extract action items, and end the manual follow-up chasing on Slack.

quick_wins.title: Self-Service Design Templates
quick_wins.description: Create Canva brand kits, social media templates, and deck frameworks so junior staff can produce client-ready assets without routing everything through the senior designer.
recommended_tools: Canva Magic Studio (Inefficient Design Workflow) → https://www.futurepedia.io/tool/canva

deeper_opportunities.title: Client Portal Development
deeper_opportunities.description: Build a self-service client portal for dashboards, reports, and project updates. The owner has wanted this for two years but never had time to execute because of manual reporting work.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI Narrative Reporting Agent
deeper_opportunities.description: Layer AI on top of automated dashboards to generate written insights, trends, and client recommendations, moving the agency from raw data delivery to strategic advisory.

deeper_opportunities.title: Brand Operations Playbook
deeper_opportunities.description: Formalize brand guidelines, design decision trees, and asset libraries into a central knowledge system to fully eliminate the senior designer bottleneck and onboard juniors faster.

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Automate the weekly client reporting workflow by connecting Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and the scheduling tool to eliminate manual spreadsheet compilation.

tool_recommendations.name: SaneBox
tool_recommendations.purpose: Filter noise and sales outreach from the owner's 200+ daily emails, prioritizing important client and team messages.

tool_recommendations.name: Fireflies.ai
tool_recommendations.purpose: Auto-transcribe daily standups and client check-ins and extract action items to prevent lost follow-ups and Slack chasing.

tool_recommendations.name: Canva Magic Studio
tool_recommendations.purpose: Empower junior staff to create social graphics and presentation decks via AI templates and brand kits, reducing senior designer bottleneck.

tool_recommendations.name: Make
tool_recommendations.purpose: Visual automation alternative to pull and process data from multiple marketing sources into unified client reports.

actions: Connect Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and scheduling tool to Zapier/Make/n8n to auto-populate reporting dashboard or spreadsheet
Install SaneBox on owner inbox and configure folders to filter sales outreach and low-priority noise
Deploy Fireflies.ai or ClickUp AI for all standups and client check-ins to capture action items automatically
Build Canva brand kit, social templates, and deck frameworks for junior staff self-service
Train team on new design workflow and document brand guidelines
Review automated report outputs and refine data mappings based on client feedback
Scope requirements and begin build of the client portal the owner has wanted for two years
Evaluate AI narrative layer on top of reporting dashboards for strategic client insights
Optimize email rules and meeting note integrations based on team usage data

researched_tools.name: Zapier
researched_tools.description: Automate tasks by connecting 7,000+ apps including Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and scheduling tools to eliminate manual reporting.

researched_tools.name: Make
researched_tools.description: Streamline workflows with intuitive visual automation across numerous apps to pull and process data from multiple sources automatically.

researched_tools.name: n8n
researched_tools.description: Streamlines operations with no-code apps and hyperautomation for integrating analytics, ads, and scheduling tools into automated reports.

researched_tools.name: ClickUp AI
researched_tools.description: Unify team productivity with AI-driven task management and collaboration, including automatic meeting note capture and action item tracking.

researched_tools.name: Fireflies.ai
researched_tools.description: AI platform that automatically transcribes meetings, generates notes, and extracts action items to prevent lost follow-ups.

researched_tools.name: SaneBox
researched_tools.description: AI-powered email sorter that filters noise, sales outreach, and prioritizes important messages to cut through 200+ daily emails.

researched_tools.name: Superhuman
researched_tools.description: Ultra-fast AI email client that triages, summarizes, and blocks distractions to handle high-volume inboxes efficiently.

researched_tools.name: Canva Magic Studio
researched_tools.description: AI design platform with templates, brand kits, and auto-generation for social graphics and decks, empowering junior staff.
